message:
🐛 Fix Smart Channel play always showing first group preview (#104)

_playFailoverGroup used _filteredChannels.indexWhere to find the channel
index, but grouped channels are filtered out so it always returned -1.
This meant _previewChannel was never updated via setState, making it
appear the wrong group was playing.

Now always update _previewChannel regardless of filter index.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
